subject: fix(theme): strengthen DaisyUI migration — selects, neutral conflict, cross-tab sync
body:
Audit and fix issues from the initial migration pass:

- Fix 4 <select> elements using `input input-bordered` instead of
  `select select-bordered` (TransactionTable, TransactionEditModal)
- Rename --color-neutral to --color-data-neutral in @theme to avoid
  conflict with DaisyUI's `neutral` semantic color (bg-neutral now
  correctly resolves to DaisyUI theme color, not our chart gray)
- Add `syncing` guard flag in useDarkMode cross-tab sync to prevent
  watchers from redundantly calling applyTheme() and re-persisting
  values that already came from another tab's localStorage write
- Fix ImportStepReview duplicated classes: `w-full w-48` and
  `text-base text-xs` (conflicting width/size on same element)
- Broaden print CSS break-inside selector: `.card` → `.card, .rounded-xl`

Tags: theme, daisyui, fix, a11y, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
